global_description: A small, compact water bird with a rounded body and short neck. It features a predominantly brown plumage with a distinctive black and white bill. The bird has a smooth, glossy texture, and its feathers are tightly packed.

part_details.body: Rounded, compact, covered in brown feathers with a glossy sheen.
part_details.bill: Short, thick, black and white, distinctive pied pattern.
part_details.neck: Short, blending seamlessly into the body.
part_details.feathers: Tightly packed, smooth, brown with a glossy finish.

spatial_relations: The short neck connects the rounded body to the head.
The pied bill is positioned at the front of the head.
